title: T-001 — Add onboarding_state JSONB column to organizations
prompt:
Add onboarding_state column to the organizations table (JSONB) to track wizard progress.

PRD §14.3 defines state shape: {"current_step", "completed_steps", "skipped_steps", "started_at", "last_activity_at"}

Acceptance:
- Migration adds organizations.onboarding_state JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{"current_step": 1, "completed_steps": [], "skipped_steps": [], "started_at": null, "last_activity_at": null}'
- Column supports indexing on current_step for resume queries
- Existing orgs default to step 1, empty tracking lists
- Schema matches exactly: no extra fields, no null in current_step
- Migration is reversible

Test: RED test should verify that a fresh org has current_step=1, empty lists, and both timestamps are null.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add onboarding_state JSONB column to organizations table
pipeline_inputs.details: Create a database migration that adds organizations.onboarding_state as a JSONB column. Default value must be a JSON object with keys: current_step (integer, 1), completed_steps (empty array), skipped_steps (empty array), started_at (null), last_activity_at (null). The column must not allow NULL; use the JSON default shown above. This column will be updated as the wizard progresses through steps 1-6. Index on current_step for efficient resume queries.
acceptance_criteria: Given a new organization, when created, then onboarding_state defaults to {"current_step": 1, "completed_steps": [], "skipped_steps": [], "started_at": null, "last_activity_at": null}
Given the schema, when queried with WHERE onboarding_state->>'current_step' = '3', then the index is used efficiently
Given an existing migration, when rolled back, then the organizations table is restored to pre-migration state
test_strategy: Write RED test: test_onboarding_state_default_shape() verifies JSON structure matches PRD
After migration, verify schema with: SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='organizations' AND column_name='onboarding_state'
risk_red_lines: Do not allow null values in onboarding_state
Do not deviate from the PRD-specified JSON keys and types
Do not forget the migration rollback (DOWN clause)
